brief_justification: The XML is missing the article body entirely (no <body> element), containing only front matter and references. Based on available metadata — the title about social movements, protests, and participation during the pandemic, zero figures/tables/equations, publication in a public administration journal, and a reference list dominated by social movement theory classics (Tilly, Tarrow, McAdam) — this is a theoretical or editorial introduction to a special issue. It is not an empirical quantitative paper and adopts an essayistic approach grounded in social movement theory.
